prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-65THROWINGKNIVES-EAGMUL Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Bald Eagle Throwing Knives 3 Piece Set Description: Practice your throwing knife skills with the ASR Outdoor 3 Piece Throwing Knife Set featureing the American Bald Eagle design.

This set of 6.5" throwing knives comes with a nylon sheath, and the blades feature a patriotic bald eagle and American flag design. The blades are constructed of 3CR13 stainless steel so they wont rust, and the set comes with 3 different colors (rainbow, navy and gold) which gives them a unique look.

Each knife features a hole at the top that can be used to attach them to a lanyard or rope. The nylon sheath will house them when not in use for safety purposes, and it comes with a loop so you can easily attach it to your belt, pocket or backpack. This is a must-have set of throwing knives for outdoor enthusiasts and knife collectors alike. Search Terms: throwing knives blade american rebel flag stuff ninja tools camping blades hunting tactical set multi-pack outdoor amateur beginner 3 piece professional thrower Features: - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of 3CR13 Stainless Steel - Won't Rust - PATRIOTIC DESIGN - Multi-color Blades Feature Etched Bald Eagle & American Flag for Unique Look - COMPACT SIZE - 6.5" Overall Length, Ideal for Pockets, Belt Loops & Backpacks - LANYARD HOLE - Can Easily Be Attached to Lanyard, Rope or Key Chain - NYLON SHEATH -Comes with Durable Sheath to Protect Blades When Not in Use - Belt Loop Function === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-Piece 6.5in Bald Eagle Throwing Knives

anthropic.title_differentiation: 3CR13 Stainless Steel, Patriotic Eagle And Flag Design, Multi-Color Blades, Includes Nylon Sheath With Belt Loop, Lanyard Hole

openai.title_differentiation: 3CR13 Stainless Steel, Rust Resistant, Bald Eagle And American Flag Etching, Nylon Sheath, Lanyard Holes
